name: iLoveIMG
description: A free image-processing site I often use for compression. Better than TinyPNG, and chained processing is very handy.

name: TinyPNG
description: A well-known image compressor. It has size and quantity limits, but it's a solid alternative.

name: removebg
description: An AI background-removal tool with a clean UI. Better than Windows' built-in remover, though free exports have size limits.

name: Neumorphism
description: Neumorphism is a distinctive design style that impresses newcomers, though it's not widely used and has practical drawbacks. Kept here as a keepsake.

name: Nucleo
description: A clean icon library with a fun pixel-style category, plus many other icons including a grass style.

name: Loadership
description: Thirteen configurable loader styles. Less essential in the AI era.

name: CSS Buttons
description: A collection of button styles, somewhat related to Neumorphism.

name: Uiverse
description: An essential reference library with many interactive effects, including popular button and loader designs. Rich and still updating.

name: Magic UI
description: A companion library for shadcn/ui with practical designs you can copy individually.

name: Ai lman
description: Similar to Magic UI, though less polished — nice for browsing after Magic UI.

name: Awwwards
description: A website awards gallery where you can discover impressive sites.

name: CSS Design Awards
description: A website awards gallery similar to Awwwards, showcasing each round's best sites.

name: 404s.design
description: A collection of 404 page designs — fun to browse when bored.

name: Igloo Inc.
description: An abeto project — very impressive.

name: abeto Official Site
description: Endlessly blooming flowers, drifting leaves, and a stylized retro aesthetic.

name: Messenger
description: An abeto project: a cartoon courier running through a global town, with online multiplayer and outfits.

name: Summer Afternoon
description: A boy playing on a country road on a summer afternoon.

name: The Monolith Project
description: A cinematic animated fantasy universe: across many stars, a silent monolith awakens. The Monolith Project — every touch can rewrite reality.

name: Making Software
description: A reference handbook for software designers and developers — a beautifully styled learning site.

name: Easing Function Reference
description: An easing table that helps you visualize animation timing.

name: Isocons
description: A cool, free 3D icon website.

name: WoraWork
description: A grid-world Web3D experience with excellent scene rendering.
